project.name: Focal Point Compass CRM
project.description: A full-featured CRM platform for managing clients, leads, deals, projects, tasks, invoices, payroll, HR (hiring, candidates, attendance), team communication, automation rules, and real-time analytics. Designed for admin/manager/employee/client role hierarchy.
project.deployment: Docker Compose — backend + frontend + PostgreSQL + Nginx + monitoring stack

backend.auth: JWT (access 24h + refresh 30d) + bcrypt passwords + Google OAuth

frontend.state: React Context API (5 contexts: Auth, Notification, Realtime, Theme, Workspace)
frontend.data-fetching: Custom api-client.ts + custom hooks (use-crm-data, use-comments, etc.)

backend-architecture.data-flow: HTTP Request → rate-limit.middleware → auth.middleware (JWT verify → req.user) → validate.middleware (Zod schema) → Controller (thin HTTP layer) → Service (business logic + Prisma calls) → Prisma ORM → PostgreSQL / SQLite → Response JSON

layer.name: config
layer.file: Loads + validates .env variables (PORT, DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, SMTP_*, etc.)
Singleton PrismaClient instance used across all services
Shared TypeScript interfaces for Express context

layer.name: middleware
layer.file: Verifies JWT, attaches req.user = {id, email, role}. Required on all protected routes.
Global error handler — catches all thrown errors, formats response.
Zod-based request body/query validator. Usage: validate(schema).
IP-based rate limiting (100 req/15min default).
Prometheus HTTP metrics collection.

module.name: static-crm
module.note: Serves static lookup data (industries, statuses, etc.)

layer.name: utils
layer.file: generateAccessToken(), generateRefreshToken(), verifyToken()
hashPassword(), comparePassword() — bcrypt wrappers
logAuditEvent(action, userId, entityType, entityId, meta) — writes AuditLog records
Role-based permission checks: canAccess(role, resource, action)
In-memory TTL cache for expensive queries
sendMail(to, subject, html) — uses SMTP config from env
HTML email templates (verification, welcome, password reset)
Structured logger with log levels (info/warn/error/debug)
Prometheus counter/histogram definitions
asyncHandler(fn) wrapper — eliminates try/catch boilerplate in controllers
Maps DB client records to API response shape
Builds employee profile object from User + TeamMember records
Payment mode enum helpers

model.name: User
model.fields: id(String,PK,uuid) | name | email(unique) | password | role(admin|manager|employee|client) | employeeId | department | team | designation | manager | workingHours | officeLocation | timeZone | baseSalary | allowances | deductions | paymentMode | payrollCycle | payrollDueDate | joinedAt | location | isVerified | verificationToken | resetToken | resetTokenExpiry | signatureUrl | refreshToken | googleId | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Client
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | email | industry | manager | status(active|pending|completed) | revenue | location | avatar | tier(Enterprise|Growth|Strategic) | healthScore | nextAction | segment | phone | company | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Lead
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | email | company | status | stage | source | assignedTo | value | probability | expectedClose | notes | lifecycleStage | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Deal
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | title | amount | stage | probability | closeDate | clientId | assignedTo | createdBy | notes | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Contact
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | email | phone | role | company | clientId | notes | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Task
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | title | description | status(todo|in-progress|done) | priority(low|medium|high) | dueDate | assignedTo | projectId | tags | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Project
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | description | status | startDate | endDate | budget | clientId | teamId | createdBy | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Invoice
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | invoiceNumber | clientId | amount | tax | total | status(draft|sent|paid|overdue) | dueDate | items(Json) | createdBy | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Team
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | description | managerId | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: TeamMember
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | userId | teamId | role | joinedAt

model.name: Attendance
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | userId | date | checkIn | checkOut | status(present|absent|late|halfday) | notes

model.name: Payroll
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | userId | month | year | baseSalary | allowances | deductions | netPay | status(pending|processed|paid) | paymentDate | createdAt

model.name: Candidate
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | email | phone | position | skills(Json) | status | resume | experience | education | appliedAt | createdBy | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: HiringJob
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | title | department | location | type | description | requirements | status | openings | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Note
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | content | entityType | entityId | createdBy | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Comment
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | content | entityType | entityId | authorId | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: Attachment
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | filename | url | size | mimeType | entityType | entityId | uploadedBy | createdAt

model.name: CalendarEvent
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | title | description | start | end | type | attendees(Json) | location | createdBy | createdAt

model.name: AutomationRule
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | name | trigger | conditions(Json) | actions(Json) | isActive | lastRun | createdAt | updatedAt

model.name: AuditLog
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | action | userId | entityType | entityId | meta(Json) | ip | createdAt

model.name: Preferences
model.fields: id(Int,PK) | userId | theme | notifications(Json) | dashboardLayout(Json) | updatedAt

data-models.migrations-log: 20260330 → initial schema (Users, Clients, Leads, Deals, Tasks, Projects, Invoices) 20260402 → AuditLog table 20260405 → Teams + TeamMembers 20260406 → CalendarEvent, Payroll, Task.projectId FK, User.signatureUrl 20260407–08 → Candidate columns (skills, phone) 20260409 → Comments + Attachments 20260421 → createdBy column on Deal, Project, Invoice, Candidate

endpoint.note: Aggregated KPIs: total clients, revenue, tasks, leads
Global search across clients, leads, tasks, projects

entry-points.file: App bootstrap — wraps App in all Providers
Root router — all route definitions, protected route wrappers
HTML shell with meta tags, Vite entry script

contexts.note: All wrapped in main.tsx in this order:
contexts.context: Manages user auth state. Provides: user, login(), logout(), isAuthenticated, isLoading. Reads JWT from localStorage. Auto-refresh on token expiry.
Dark/light mode toggle. Persists in localStorage.
Active workspace/org settings. Used for multi-tenant features.
Socket.IO connection. Provides: socket, on(), emit(). Used for live notifications.
In-app notification queue. Provides: notifications[], markRead(), clearAll().

layout-components.file: Main layout shell — Sidebar + Navbar + children outlet
Full sidebar with all module nav links + collapse behavior
Top bar — search, notifications bell, user avatar, theme toggle
RBAC guard — checks user.role against allowed roles prop, redirects if denied
Sidebar nav items config — labels, icons, paths, required roles

page.note: KPI cards, charts, operating cadence, recent activity

shared-components.file: Reusable KPI stat card with trend indicator
Color-coded status pill for any entity status
React error boundary wrapping the app
Lightweight chart wrappers (no heavy charting lib)

modal-dialogs.file: Universal quick-create modal (Tasks, Projects, Clients, etc.)
Full task detail + edit + comments + attachments modal
Project detail + members + tasks sub-list modal
Global ⌘K command palette for navigation + quick actions

hooks.file: Master data hook — fetches and caches all CRM entities via api-client
Fetch + create comments for any entity
Fetch + upload attachments for any entity
Provides refresh trigger to re-fetch data
Persist column/filter preferences per list page
Tracks performance metrics on the frontend
Returns isMobile boolean from media query

lib-utilities.file: Central Axios/fetch wrapper — attaches Auth headers, handles 401 auto-refresh, base URL config
CSS design tokens (colors, spacing, typography) as JS constants
General utility functions (cn(), formatDate(), formatCurrency(), etc.)
Frontend logger (dev console / prod error tracking)
Animation helpers (Framer Motion or CSS triggers)
Frontend env var accessor (VITE_ prefix vars)

services.file: All CRM API call functions (typed) — used by hooks and pages
auth API calls: login(), signup(), logout(), getMe(), refreshToken()

types.file: All CRM TypeScript interfaces — Client, Lead, Deal, Task, Project, Invoice, User, etc.
Automation rule, trigger, action TypeScript types

node.depends-on: prisma (aggregations across Client, Lead, Task, Deal, Project)
prisma (parallel queries: Client, Lead, Task, Project, Deal)
App.tsx, AuthContext, ThemeContext, WorkspaceContext, RealtimeContext, NotificationContext

cross-cutting.item: Auth flow: AuthContext → api-client (attaches token) → all API calls
Audit trail: Every mutating backend action → audit.ts → AuditLog table
Error boundary: AppErrorBoundary wraps entire app → ErrorFallback UI on crash

patterns-and-conventions.pattern: Services call Prisma directly. They validate business rules, check RBAC via access-control.ts, write audit logs via audit.ts, and use cache.ts for expensive reads. Services never touch req/res objects.

All API calls go through frontend/src/lib/api-client.ts which auto-attaches JWT headers. Pages use either: (1) useEffect + useState, or (2) custom hooks (use-crm-data.ts). Mutation responses update local state directly (optimistic UI) or trigger re-fetch.
Route protection: router.use(authMiddleware) → controllers call access-control.ts. Some routes use role-specific middleware inline.
RouteAccessGuard component wraps protected routes with allowedRoles prop. AdminOnly component wraps UI elements that only admins should see.
Backend: All errors propagate to error.middleware.ts via next(error) or asyncHandler catch. Frontend: AppErrorBoundary catches render errors. NetworkErrorBridge shows API failures.
All request bodies/queries validated by Zod schemas in backend/src/validators/. Usage: router.post('/', validate(clientSchema), createClient)
Every CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE operation calls: logAuditEvent(action, userId, entityType, entityId, meta) Stored in AuditLog table. Viewable at /audit-log (admin only).
Server emits: 'notification', 'task:updated', 'lead:updated', 'deal:updated' Client subscribes in RealtimeContext, dispatches to NotificationContext.

Backend: {module}.controller.ts | {module}.service.ts | {module}.routes.ts | {module}.schema.ts Frontend: PascalCase pages (ClientsPage.tsx) | camelCase hooks (use-crm-data.ts) | camelCase lib (api-client.ts)

changes-log.change: fix: lint errors - remove unnecessary escapes, add missing useMemo dependency
feat: add multi-admin data isolation for Teams, Members, Payroll

change.files: .github/workflows/cd.yml, .github/workflows/ci.yml, backend/create-admin.ts, backend/package-lock.json, backend/package.json, backend/src/routes/upload.routes.ts, backend/src/services/activity.service.ts, backend/src/services/automation-engine.ts

changes-log.change: feat(prod): add pagination limits, query caching, performance optimizations - ready for production
fix(ci): remove no-explicit-any lint errors in ClientsPage tests
fix(ci): fix env vars, Node 20, add missing migration
fix(ci): fix env vars, Node 20, add missing InboxEmail/ImapAccount migration
Update nginx.conf to allow additional IPs
merge: feature/lead-email-tracking into develop

change.author: Rajeev

changes-log.change: feat: UI cleanup, audit retention, bulk email, prod fixes
feat(leads): add email sending, inbox tracking, and auto status advancement

change.files: backend/package-lock.json, backend/package.json, backend/prisma/schema.prisma, backend/src/app.ts, backend/src/controllers/inbox.controller.ts, backend/src/middleware/rate-limit.middleware.ts, backend/src/routes/inbox.routes.ts, backend/src/server.ts
change.author: Rajeev

changes-log.change: feat(inbox): add IMAP email inbox — connect Gmail, sync emails, link to CRM entities
chore: restore prod.sh parallel testing section from stash
chore: update codebase-snapshot.xml
feat: merge security-fix — security patches, cookie settings, password validation, rate limiting improvements
Merge pull request #15 from elonerajeev/workspace-enhancement
fix/make clean and clear git branching , add CI & CD pipelines , improve more things

change.files: backend/package-lock.json, backend/package.json, backend/prisma/schema.prisma, backend/src/app.ts, backend/src/controllers/auth.controller.ts, backend/src/controllers/static-crm.controller.ts, backend/src/routes/auth.routes.ts, backend/src/routes/automation.routes.ts

changes-log.change: Fixed Sales and Marketing things
fix: add missing state variables for pagination visibility
fix: ensure task operations sync with server data
fix: implement proper optimistic updates for task move/delete operations

script.purpose: Full deployment: pull, build, migrate, restart
Seed initial DB data (run: ts-node backend/scripts/seed.ts)

dashboard.note: Pre-built Grafana dashboard for CRM metrics

ai-agent-rules.rule: NEVER read raw source files unless the user asks to inspect a specific file. This index is sufficient for architecture understanding.
When adding a new backend module: create {module}.service.ts → {module}.controller.ts → {module}.routes.ts → {module}.schema.ts → register in app.ts. Update this file's api-index section.
When adding a new frontend page: create in pages/, add route in App.tsx, add sidebar entry in sidebarConfig.ts if needed, wrap with RouteAccessGuard.
All DB changes require a Prisma migration: npx prisma migrate dev --name {description}. Update data-models section here.
Authentication always uses req.user.id and req.user.role — populated by auth.middleware.ts. Never trust client-sent userId.
Frontend API calls always go through frontend/src/lib/api-client.ts — never use raw fetch() or axios directly in components.
All controller functions MUST be wrapped in asyncHandler() — no raw try/catch in controllers.
When updating this snapshot, append a change entry in the changes-log section with date, files, and summary.
The Gmail SMTP password is an App Password (16 chars, no spaces). Not the Gmail login password.
Socket.IO events flow: backend socket.ts emits → frontend RealtimeContext listens → NotificationContext dispatches → UI updates.
